target: WIN-029 tldr_evidence vs tldr_verdict number inconsistency fix; OBE acknowledgments for optional ISS-2305/2332/2333
tldr_evidence: WIN-029 (Schumann resonance) tldr_evidence says 'discrepancies of 5.3%, 10.8%, and 6.4% respectively' when applying the spherical formula to the three dome cavity heights; tldr_verdict says 'pairwise discrepancies of 5.3%, 6.4%, and 12.1%'. These are measuring different things (individual formula-discrepancy vs pairwise inter-height) but share the 5.3% figure and differ on 10.8% vs 12.1% — a reader comparing both panels sees conflicting numbers. The fix: remove the ambiguous per-height discrepancy figures from tldr_evidence and replace with the pairwise framing consistent with tldr_verdict, while preserving the substantive point that no single dome height is self-consistent. ISS-2305, ISS-2332, ISS-2333 are explicitly labelled 'Optional'/'No new action required' in their curmudgeon recommendations and are resolved as OBE.
tldr_verdict: One data patch to data/wins.json (WIN-029 tldr_evidence). Three OBE resolutions. No verdict changes. The patch removes inconsistent per-height discrepancy figures from evidence and substitutes the pairwise framing already established in tldr_verdict.

patches.description: Reconcile WIN-029 tldr_evidence pairwise discrepancy numbers with tldr_verdict (ISS-2355)
patches.find_text: Applying the correct spherical formula to the dome's own three stated cavity heights (9,572 km, 9,086 km, 8,537 km) gives discrepancies of 5.3%, 10.8%, and 6.4% respectively — no single dome geometry is self-consistent with the measurement.
patches.replace_text: The dome's own three stated cavity heights (9,572 km, 9,086 km, 8,537 km) are mutually inconsistent — pairwise discrepancies of 5.3%, 6.4%, and 12.1% — and none recovers 7.83 Hz under the correct spherical formula.

obe_rationale.ISS-2305: Curmudgeon recommendation explicitly marked 'Optional follow-up'. The §2b.6 paragraph already anchors catalog-math correctly. Arithmetic-anchor clause would add minimal marginal value. Closing as low-priority acknowledged.
obe_rationale.ISS-2332: Curmudgeon recommendation explicitly marked 'Low priority since the c2 entries already read well'. The tidal WIN entries (WIN-045/046/049/050/051) each have WIN-specific content meeting the consolidation intent. Closing as already-sufficient.
obe_rationale.ISS-2333: Curmudgeon recommendation says 'No new action required beyond c1's recommendation'. §6.1 cross-reference was c1's optional suggestion; current state is acceptable. Closing as acknowledged.

notes: tldr_evidence pairwise fix uses the same numbers as tldr_verdict (5.3%, 6.4%, 12.1%) which are consistent: using the smaller height as denominator for each pair (9572 vs 9086 → 5.3%; 9086 vs 8537 → 6.4%; 9572 vs 8537 → 12.1%). The old evidence numbers (5.3%, 10.8%, 6.4%) mixed denominators and described a different computation — creating apparent contradiction with the verdict panel.
